name: Freezer Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush berries thoroughly and place them in a large bowl.
2. Add sugar to the crushed berries and mix well. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Mix lemon juice with the liquid pectin and add it to the berry mixture.
4. Stir until all sugar crystals are dissolved.
5. Ladle the mixture quickly into jars, leaving at least 1 inch of headspace.
6. Seal the jars tightly and store in the freezer for at least 24 hours to allow them to set completely.
7. Once set, transfer the jam to airtight containers and store in the refrigerator. It will keep in the fridge for up to 3 weeks.
